title: Lhyfe Signs a 4-year Green Hydrogen Offtake Contract with INOCEL to Fuel and Support the Development and Production of its Fuel Cell Power Generation Solutions
content: Lhyfe announces the signing of a major contract with INOCEL covering the supply of up to 140 tonnes of green hydrogen over a period of four years for the test benches of high-power fuel cells manufactured by INOCEL. This contract reinforces the joint commitment of Lhyfe and INOCEL to the energy transition.
author: Analysts Account
